name: mongosync_phase
description: Current high-level mongosync phase (e.g. InitializingCollectionsAndIndexes, CollectionCopy, ChangeEventApplication, Commit, Reverse).

name: mongosync_lag_time
description: Replication lag in seconds between source and destination as seen by mongosync.

name: verifier_lag_time
description: Replication lag in seconds as observed by the verifier.

name: mongosync_src_ping_latency
description: Distribution of ping latencies to the source cluster.

name: mongosync_dst_ping_latency
description: Distribution of ping latencies to the destination cluster.

name: mongosync_src_unavailable
description: 1 when the source cluster is considered temporarily unavailable, 0 otherwise.

name: mongosync_dst_unavailable
description: 1 when the destination cluster is considered temporarily unavailable, 0 otherwise.

name: mongosync_retry_count
description: Total number of retry attempts performed by mongosync across operations.

name: mongosync_host_cpu_usage
description: Approximate CPU usage of the host running mongosync.

name: mongosync_host_memory_percent_used
description: Approximate memory utilization of the host running mongosync.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_source_read_op_duration
description: Duration of source read operations during collection copy.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_destination_write_op_duration
description: Duration of destination write operations during collection copy.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_copied_bytes_count
description: Total number of bytes copied during collection copy.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_copied_docs_count
description: Total number of documents copied during collection copy.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_partitions_completed_count
description: Number of collection copy partitions that have completed.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_partition_size
description: Distribution of partition sizes used during collection copy.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_copy_partition_duration
description: Duration of copying an individual partition.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_partitions_deleted_count
description: Number of collection-copy partitions deleted during cleanup.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_partition_copy_docs_deleted_count
description: Number of documents deleted when cleaning up copied partition data.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_partition_copy_bytes_deleted_count
description: Number of bytes deleted when cleaning up copied partition data.

name: mongosync_collection_copy_partition_copy_bytes_read_per_second
description: Effective read throughput (bytes per second) per collection-copy partition.

name: mongosync_buffer_service_bytes_processed_count
description: Total number of bytes processed through the buffer service.

name: mongosync_buffer_service_docs_processed_count
description: Total number of documents processed through the buffer service.

name: mongosync_buffer_service_doc_size
description: Distribution of document sizes processed by the buffer service.

name: mongosync_buffer_service_insertions_count
description: Number of insert operations into the buffer service.

name: mongosync_buffer_service_insert_duration
description: Duration of buffer service insert operations.

name: mongosync_buffer_service_doc_buffers_in_channel_count
description: Current number of buffered document batches in the buffer channel.

name: mongosync_bulk_inserter_docs_inserted_count
description: Total number of documents inserted by the bulk inserter.

name: mongosync_bulk_inserter_bytes_inserted_count
description: Total number of bytes inserted by the bulk inserter.

name: mongosync_bulk_inserter_docs_per_batch
description: Distribution of documents per bulk-insert batch.

name: mongosync_bulk_inserter_bytes_per_batch
description: Distribution of bytes per bulk-insert batch.

name: mongosync_cea_change_stream_reader_events_read
description: Total number of change-stream events read from the source during CEA.

name: mongosync_cea_change_stream_reader_bytes_read
description: Total number of bytes read from the change stream during CEA.

name: mongosync_cea_total_events_applied
description: Total number of change events (CRUD and DDL) applied.

name: mongosync_cea_source_read_op_duration
description: Duration of source read operations during Change Event Application (CEA).

name: mongosync_cea_destination_write_op_duration
description: Duration of destination write operations during Change Event Application (CEA).

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_txn_size
description: Distribution of the number of events per CRUD transaction.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_txn_duration
description: Duration of applying a single CRUD transaction.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_single_count
description: Number of single-event CRUD applications.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_single_write_duration
description: Duration of individual single-event CRUD writes.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_duplicate_key_errors_count
description: Number of duplicate key errors encountered during CRUD application.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_one_by_one_events_count
description: Number of CRUD events applied one-by-one instead of batched.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_default_error_count
description: Number of CRUD apply errors that do not fall into more specific error categories.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_refetch_duration
description: Duration of document refetch operations performed by the CRUD applier.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_apply_event_duration
description: Duration of applying individual CRUD events.

name: mongosync_cea_total_crud_events_applied
description: Total number of CRUD events applied during CEA.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_lws_get_entry_duration
description: Duration of reading entries from the last-write-states store.

name: mongosync_cea_crud_applier_lws_set_entry_duration
description: Duration of writing entries into the last-write-states store.

name: mongosync_cea_reader_to_dispatcher_aggregate_channel_utilization
description: Aggregate utilization of the reader-to-dispatcher channel across streams.

name: mongosync_cea_dispatcher_to_processor_aggregate_channel_utilization
description: Aggregate utilization of the dispatcher-to-processor channel across streams.

name: mongosync_cea_spread_disparity
description: Disparity between busiest and least busy processors, indicating load balance quality.

name: mongosync_cea_total_ddl_events_applied
description: Total number of DDL events successfully applied.

name: mongosync_hot_doc_states_read_op_duration
description: Duration of destination hot-document metadata reads during commit.

name: mongosync_hot_doc_refetch_op_duration
description: Duration of source reads when refetching hot documents during commit.

name: mongosync_hot_doc_apply_op_duration
description: Duration of hot-document apply (replaceOne/delete) operations during commit.

name: mongosync_cea_total_hot_doc_crud_events_skipped
description: Total number of CRUD events skipped for hot documents during CEA.

name: mongosync_index_checker_service_create_indexes_duration
description: Duration of batched createIndexes commands issued by the Index Checker Service.

name: mongosync_index_checker_service_created_count
description: Total number of indexes created by the Index Checker Service.

name: verifier_initial_hasher_docs_hashed_total
description: Total number of documents hashed during initial hashing for all collections.

name: verifier_auditor_num_docs_hashed
description: Total number of documents hashed as tracked by the verifier auditor.

name: verifier_auditor_estimated_docs_count
description: Estimated total number of documents the verifier expects to hash.

name: verifier_auditor_scanned_collection_count
description: Number of collections that have completed initial hashing.

name: verifier_batch_writer_handle_batch_total_time
description: Total time taken to handle a batch in the verifier's DB writer (read + write).

name: verifier_batch_writer_handle_batch_read_time
description: Time spent reading existing state for a batch in the verifier's DB writer.

name: verifier_batch_writer_handle_batch_write_time
description: Time spent writing a batch in the verifier's DB writer.

name: verifier_batch_writer_handle_batch_payloads_processed_total
description: Number of payloads processed per batch in the verifier's DB writer.
